It allows an employee to change a game's age range
changeAuthor(String) - Method in class product.Comic
It allows for an employee to change the comic's author
changeAvailability(boolean) - Method in class product.SecondHandProduct
Changes the availability of the second-hand product
changeBrand(String) - Method in class product.Figurine
It allows for an employee to change the figurine's brand
changeConservationStatus(ConservationStatus) - Method in class product.SecondHandProduct
Changes the conservation status of the second-hand product
changeDate(LocalDateTime) - Method in class exchange.Exchange
Changes the date of the exchange
changeDescription(String) - Method in class product.Product
It allows for an employee to change a product's description
changeDimension(String) - Method in class product.Figurine
It allows for an employee to change the figurine's dimension
changeDiscount(double) - Method in class order.QuantityDisc
It allows the manager to change the quantity discount's discount
changeDiscount(double) - Method in class order.VolumeDisc
It allows the manager to change the volume discount's discount
changeDiscount(Discount) - Method in class product.StoreProduct
It allows an employee to add discounts to products or categories (Discounts is in charge of making sure they don't overlap)
changeEditorial(String) - Method in class product.Comic
It allows for an employee to change the comic's editorial
changeEndDate(LocalDateTime) - Method in class order.Discount
It allows the manager to change a discount's end date
changeEstimatedPrice(double) - Method in class product.SecondHandProduct
Changes the estimated price of the second-hand product
changeExchanged(boolean) - Method in class exchange.Exchange
Changes if the exchange was done
changeGameStyle(GameStyle) - Method in class product.Game
It allows an employee to change a game's style
changeGift(StoreProduct) - Method in class order.GiftDisc
It allows the manager to change a gift discount's gift
changeMaterial(String) - Method in class product.Figurine
It allows for an employee to change the figurine's material
changeName(String) - Method in class product.Category
It allows a manager to change a Category's name
changeName(String) - Method in class product.Product
It allows for an employee to change a product's name
changeNumPages(int) - Method in class product.Comic
It allows for an employee to change the comic's number of pages
changeNumPlayers(int) - Method in class product.Game
It allows an employee to change a game's number of players
changeNumProds(int) - Method in class order.QuantityDisc
It allows the manager to change the quantity discount's amount of products in a cart from which the discount can take place
changeOfferTime(Period) - Method in class store.Parameter
Change the expiration of an offer
changeOrderTime(Period) - Method in class store.Parameter
Change the expiration of an order
changePassword(String) - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
It changes the client's password
changePassword(String) - Method in class user.User
Changes the password of the user
changePercentage(double) - Method in class order.FixedPerDisc
It allows the manager to change the fixed percentage discount's percentage
changePhoto(String) - Method in class product.Product
It allows for an employee to change a product's photo's path
changePrice(double) - Method in class product.Product
It allows for an employee to change a product's price
changeSpendingThreshold(double) - Method in class order.GiftDisc
It allows the manager to change the gift discount's spending threshold
changeSpendingThreshold(double) - Method in class order.VolumeDisc
It allows the manager to change the volume discount's spending threshold
changeStartDate(LocalDateTime) - Method in class order.Discount
It allows the manager to change a discount's start date
changeStatus(OrderState) - Method in class order.Order
 
changeStock(int) - Method in class product.StoreProduct
It allows for an employee to change the product's stock as well as blocking or unblocking stock
changeType(ProductType) - Method in class product.Product
It allows for an employee to change a product's product's type

changeYear(Year) - Method in class product.Comic
It allows for an employee to change the comic's publishing year
checkExpiration() - Method in class exchange.Offer
It checks if the offer has surpassed the maximum amount of time an offer can be active for

It allows a client to add products from their wallet to an offer
chooseTheirProducts(SecondHandProduct...) - Method in class exchange.Offer
